title: Sculk Mod
description: This mod adds new weapons, armor, tools, and mechanics.
body:
**Skulk mod review:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/z8GjT3fu5eo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**If there are sculk blocks nearby, and if sculk armor or tools have the Mending enchantment, they will be repaired.**

> Mode adds
> New tools ![Sculk tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce8c69332e7f001a8fa6bf839219f86c4b478f3f.png)
> New armor and weapons ![Sculk armor and weapon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3319f34b23a50d1bd4103105fae57e8e5e1aa5e8_0.webp)
> And more ![and more](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/430d47ae08036aaa1c827d3a18a8cb00d88e46b8.png)
> Most items are crafted on a smithing table using a sculk upgrade template and echo shard. ![Sculk crafts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/257a77c6a062579caa9590544e0954b3a30ac0d5.png)
_Sculk Upgrade Template can be found in chests in the ancient city._
